data.title: Listrak launches Holiday Resource Center to support retailers with tools and insights for 2025 holiday season.
data.description: Lititz, Pennsylvania - On August 7, 2025, Listrak, a leading marketing automation platform, introduced its "Season of Success: Holiday Resource Center," offering a range of tools and insights to aid retailers in achieving success during the upcoming 2025 holiday season. The suite includes valuable resources tailored to support retailers throughout this critical period.

data.title: Transak now supports USDe, Ethena Labs' synthetic dollar, becoming the third-largest tokenized dollar. USDe has $10B in circulation and is maintained through a crypto-native strategy. Integration offers direct access via credit cards and regional banking systems.
data.description: Transak has revealed the inclusion of (CRYPTO: USDe) - Ethena Labs' synthetic dollar, onto its worldwide fiat on-ramp system. This shift grants users beyond the U.S. direct access to USDe, currently the third-largest tokenized dollar globally, via local payment methods. USDe has amassed a circulation of almost $10 billion, propelling its ascent to the top of stablecoin charts due to its distinctive, crypto-centric design. Unlike other stablecoins tied to fiat reserves or bank assets, USDe is upheld by a delta-neutral fiscal strategy, cutting ties with centralized financial systems. Through Transak's incorporation, individuals can now easily obtain USDe using credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and regional banking services. The integration is aligned with Transak's overarching goal… (Full story accessible on Benzinga.com).

data.title: Koppers Holdings Inc. (KOP) declares $0.08 per share quarterly cash dividend, Aug 7, 2025.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 7, 2025, Koppers Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KOP), a company specializing in treated wood products, wood treatment chemicals, and carbon compounds, revealed that their Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share.

data.title: Sikhs For Justice to host press conference on Khalistan Referendum & India's Transnational Repression in US & Punjab.
data.description: Press Conference by Sikhs For Justice (SFJ) will be held on August 08, 2025, from 1:00 to 3:00 PM at the Lisagor Room in the National Press Club located at 529 14th Street NW, 13th Floor, Washington, DC 20045. This event is organized by SFJ and is open to journalists.

data.title: ETH surges nearing $4K, Trump tariffs start, REKT reaches new high. ETH daily transactions approach record. US allows crypto in 401k.
data.description: Ethereum (ETH) is leading among major cryptocurrencies, with notable figure Tom Lee predicting a $16,000 price target. The US is poised to allow cryptocurrencies to be included in 401k retirement plans. ETH daily transactions are approaching record levels. Senator Lummis advises to sell gold and buy Bitcoin (BTC). Indonesia is assessing the possibility of holding BTC in reserves. A developer of the Tornado project has been found guilty on one of three charges. The US has imposed a 21.6% tariff on BTC mining machines. Parataxis has debuted a $640 million BTC treasury strategy. Bakkt is planning to establish a BTC treasury company in Japan. Cosmos Health has initiated a $300 million ETH treasury. Standard Chartered is showing a preference for ETH treasury stocks over ETFs. Union Jack Oil intends to launch BTC mining facilities. Sheetz is offering discounts for crypto payments. AAVE has been targeted in a phishing attack. Nomura is preparing to introduce crypto options in Dubai. A court has demanded that WazirX disclose its agreement with Binance.

data.title: Inventor from Baltimore creates educational exercise product for kids called LEARN AT PLAY, aiming to combine learning and fun.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 7, 2025, an inventor from Baltimore, Md., shared their inspiration behind creating a novel product called LEARN AT PLAY. The invention aims to blend education with physical activity to help children grasp spelling, counting, and other essential skills in an enjoyable manner. The inventor highlighted that the innovative product offers a distinctive platform for learning, indicating their strong desire to merge fun and exercise with educational development.

data.title: Global chain transfer agents market valued at USD 249M in 2024, projected to hit USD 365M by 2031 at 5.7% CAGR.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of August 7, 2025, the Market Size of Chain Transfer Agents Market is significant. In 2024, the global market value was USD 249 million. It is anticipated to increase to USD 365 million by 2031, demonstrating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.7%.

data.title: PR_Tarkett cancels and replaces 2025 Half Year Financial Report; new report now available for download.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The number of unemployed individuals stands at 2.3 million, a significant decrease from the previous year. Additionally, the report indicated a growth in job creation, with 500,000 new jobs added in the last quarter. The government has attributed this positive trend to various economic policies implemented to stimulate growth in the job market. Despite this promising data, experts caution that there are still challenges ahead, such as the need for upskilling the workforce and addressing wage disparities across different industries.

data.title: KhushTech Korea set to launch India's first D2M feature phone under FreeStream brand using Tejas Networks SL-3000 chip.
data.description: In Seoul, New Delhi, and Baltimore, KhushTech Korea Co., Ltd. has announced the launch of the world's first Direct-to-Mobile (D2M) feature phone for Free Stream Technologies. Free Stream, a D2M technology and platform provider from Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Kanpur, collaborated with KhushTech on this project. The innovative phone is cost-effective and is equipped with the Tejas Networks SL-3000 D2M demodulator chip. It operates within the 470-608 MHz broadcast band. This breakthrough development aims to revolutionize mobile communication with an emphasis on affordability and advanced technology.

data.title: Animoca Brands and ProvLabs partner to develop NUVA, a vault marketplace for connecting RWA issuers with investors.
data.description: In New York, Animoca Brands and Provenance Blockchain Labs have revealed a collaborative effort to create NUVA, a vault marketplace linking real-world asset (RWA) issuers with investors. NUVA will serve as a centralized, chain-agnostic platform featuring a collection of vaults offered by top asset issuers, each offering unique yield strategies and risk profiles. Participating investors range from retail investors to institutions and Web3 foundations, with a focus on treasuries.

data.title: IT Contracts Training Course in London on November 18-19, 2025 to help draft watertight agreements. Important for IT professionals to understand industry norms and get best terms.
data.description: Dublin - A new training course, "Negotiating and Drafting IT Contracts Training Course 25," has been introduced and is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This course focuses on comprehending IT contracts and their intricacies to assist in creating secure agreements and effectively handling risks. With the current challenging commercial landscape, it is crucial for individuals engaged in IT transactions to be well-informed about industry trends and standards. By enrolling in this course, participants can ensure they secure the most favorable terms possible.

data.title: Iceland's data center market valued at $425M in 2024, projected to reach $812M by 2030, 11.39% CAGR. Achieves world-class energy efficiency.
data.description: Dublin – A recent report on the Iceland Data Center Market predicts significant growth opportunities from 2025 to 2030. Valued at USD 425 million in 2024, the market is expected to reach USD 812 million by 2030, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.39%. Key factors fueling this growth include the presence of bitcoin miners, strong power reliability, and a focus on green energy solutions.

data.title: BostonGene wins "AI-based Drug Discovery Solution of the Year" award in 2025 AI Breakthrough Awards. Leading AI platform transforms oncology research.
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, BostonGene, a prominent player in AI-driven solutions for drug discovery and development, has been recognized with the prestigious "AI-based Drug Discovery Solution of the Year" award by the AI Breakthrough Awards program. This accolade was bestowed upon them in the program's 8th annual edition. AI Breakthrough, a prominent market intelligence entity, bestows accolades upon top companies, technologies, and products in the worldwide Artificial Intelligence (AI) sector. BostonGene's cutting-edge AI platform is revolutionizing oncology research and drug development.

data.title: Datadog's Q2 revenue rises 28% YoY to $826.76M, beats estimates. Increase in customers to 3,850 with $100K+ ARR. Margin decline noted.
data.description: Datadog (DDOG) posted its quarterly results, with a 28% year-over-year increase in fiscal second-quarter revenue to $826.76 million, surpassing analyst expectations of $790.97 million. The adjusted EPS stood at 46 cents, higher than the analyst consensus of 42 cents. As of June 30, Datadog had 3,850 customers generating annual recurring revenue (ARR) of $100,000 or more, marking a 14% Y/Y rise. The adjusted gross margin dropped by 100 basis points to 81%, while the adjusted operating margin fell by 400 basis points to 20%. Datadog reported cash and equivalents of $3.9 billion as of June 30. Check the full story for more details.
